nodes.itemHTML: • FinRL: A Deep Reinforcement Learning Library for Automated Stock Trading in Quantitative Finance, 2020 - Introduce a DRL library FinRL that facilitates beginners to expose themselves to quantitative finance and to develop their own stock trading strategies.

• Echopraxiastars42 - API designed around structured logging, rich context, and conditional logging. There are Logback and Log4J2 implementations, but Echopraxia's API is completely dependency-free, meaning it can be implemented with any logging API.
• playwright-pyteststars251 - Official Pytest plugin for using Playwright pages with fixtures.
• Einshapestars60 - DSL-based reshaping library for JAX and other frameworks.
• ALX - Open-source library for distributed matrix factorization using Alternating Least Squares, more info in ALX: Large Scale Matrix Factorization on TPUs.
• Diffraxstars640 - Numerical differential equation solvers in JAX.
• Symbolic Functionals - Demonstration from Evolving symbolic density functionals.
• TriMap - Official JAX implementation of TriMap: Large-scale Dimensionality Reduction Using Triplets.
• mip-NeRFstars568 - Official implementation of Mip-NeRF: A Multiscale Representation for Anti-Aliasing Neural Radiance Fields.
• RegNeRF - Official implementation of RegNeRF: Regularizing Neural Radiance Fields for View Synthesis from Sparse Inputs.
• ARDM - Official implementation of Autoregressive Diffusion Models.
• D3PM - Official implementation of Structured Denoising Diffusion Models in Discrete State-Spaces.
• Gumbel-max Causal Mechanisms - Code for Learning Generalized Gumbel-max Causal Mechanisms, with extra code in GuyLor/gumbel_max_causal_gadgets_part2stars0.
• Latent Programmer - Code for the ICML 2021 paper Latent Programmer: Discrete Latent Codes for Program Synthesis.
• SNeRG - Official implementation of Baking Neural Radiance Fields for Real-Time View Synthesis.
• Spin-weighted Spherical CNNs - Adaptation of Spin-Weighted Spherical CNNs.
• VDVAE - Adaptation of Very Deep VAEs Generalize Autoregressive Models and Can Outperform Them on Images, original code at openai/vdvaestars361.
• MUSIQ - Checkpoints and model inference code for the ICCV 2021 paper MUSIQ: Multi-scale Image Quality Transformer
• AQuaDem - Official implementation of Continuous Control with Action Quantization from Demonstrations.
• Combiner - Official implementation of Combiner: Full Attention Transformer with Sparse Computation Cost.
• Dreamfields - Official implementation of the ICLR 2022 paper Progressive Distillation for Fast Sampling of Diffusion Models.
• GIFT - Official implementation of Gradual Domain Adaptation in the Wild:When Intermediate Distributions are Absent.
• Light Field Neural Rendering - Official implementation of Light Field Neural Rendering.
• guesslanguagestars56 - Functions to determine the natural language of a unicode text.
• whatlanggostars565 - Natural language detection package for Go. Supports 84 languages and 24 scripts (writing systems e.g. Latin, Cyrillic, etc).
• snowballstars33 - Snowball stemmer port (cgo wrapper) for Go. Provides word stem extraction functionality Snowball native.
• spaGOstars1.3k - Self-contained Machine Learning and Natural Language Processing library in Go.
• go-slugifystars82 - Make pretty slug with multiple languages support.
• slugstars872 - URL-friendly slugify with multiple languages support.
• Slugifystars32 - Go slugify application that handles string.
• gojiebastars2k - This is a Go implementation of jiebastars29.4k which a Chinese word splitting algorithm.
• gotokenizerstars15 - A tokenizer based on the dictionary and Bigram language models for Golang. (Now only support chinese segmentation)
• gsestars2k - Go efficient text segmentation; support english, chinese, japanese and other.
• MMSEGOstars62 - This is a GO implementation of MMSEG which a Chinese word splitting algorithm.
• prosestars2.9k - Library for text processing that supports tokenization, part-of-speech tagging, named-entity extraction, and more. English only.
• go-i18nstars2.2k - Package and an accompanying tool to work with localized text.
• go-localizestars46 - Simple and easy to use i18n (Internationalization and localization) engine - used for translating locale strings.
• go-mystemstars29 - CGo bindings to Yandex.Mystem - russian morphology analyzer.
• go-pinyinstars1.3k - CN Hanzi to Hanyu Pinyin converter.
• gotextstars356 - GNU gettext utilities for Go.
• icustars21 - Cgo binding for icu4c C library detection and conversion functions. Guaranteed compatibility with version 50.1.
• iuliia-gostars31 - Transliterate Cyrillic → Latin in every possible way.

• tstars12 - Another i18n pkg for golang, which follows GNU gettext style and supports .po/.mo files: t.T (gettext), t.N (ngettext), etc. And it contains a cmd tool xtemplate, which can extract messages as a pot file from text/html template.
• encastars12 - Minimal cgo bindings for libenca, which detects character encodings.
• go-unidecodestars96 - ASCII transliterations of Unicode text.
• gounidecodestars76 - Unicode transliterator (also known as unidecode) for Go.
• addressstars55 - Handles address representation, validation and formatting.
• alignstars78 - A general purpose application that aligns text.
• bytes - Formats and parses numeric byte values (10K, 2M, 3G, etc.).
• go-fixedwidthstars67 - Fixed-width text formatting (encoder/decoder with reflection).
• go-humanizestars3.3k - Formatters for time, numbers, and memory size to human readable format.
• gotabulatestars291 - Easily pretty-print your tabular data with Go.
• textwrapstars3 - Wraps text at end of lines. Implementation of textwrap module from Python.
• bafistars66 - Universal JSON, BSON, YAML, XML translator to ANY format using templates.
• bbConvertstars7 - Converts bbCode to HTML that allows you to add support for custom bbCode tags.
• blackfridaystars5k - Markdown processor in Go.
• github_flavored_markdown - GitHub Flavored Markdown renderer (using blackfriday) with fenced code block highlighting, clickable header anchor links.
• go-output-formatstars8 - Output go structures into multiple formats (YAML/JSON/etc) in your command line app.
• go-tomlstars1.3k - Go library for the TOML format with query support and handy cli tools.
• goqstars219 - Declarative unmarshaling of HTML using struct tags with jQuery syntax (uses GoQuery).
• html-to-markdownstars400 - Convert HTML to Markdown. Even works with entire websites and can be extended through rules.
• htmlquerystars524 - An XPath query package for HTML, lets you extract data or evaluate from HTML documents by an XPath expression.
• mxjstars528 - Encode / decode XML as JSON or map[string]interface{}; extract values with dot-notation paths and wildcards. Replaces x2j and j2x packages.
• tomlstars4k - TOML configuration format (encoder/decoder with reflection).
• allotstars56 - Placeholder and wildcard text parsing for CLI tools and bots.
• codetreestars22 - Parses indented code (python, pixy, scarlet, etc.) and returns a tree structure.
• commonregexstars834 - A collection of common regular expressions for Go.
• didstars68 - DID (Decentralized Identifiers) Parser and Stringer in Go.
• doistars7 - Document object identifier (doi) parser in Go.
• editorconfig-core-gostars108 - Editorconfig file parser and manipulator for Go.
• go-nmeastars185 - NMEA parser library for the Go language.
• go-vcardstars80 - Parse and format vCard.
• gofeedstars2k - Parse RSS and Atom feeds in Go.
• gographvizstars496 - Parses the Graphviz DOT language.
• gonamepartsstars38 - Parses human names into individual name parts.
• ltsvstars8 - High performance LTSV (Labeled Tab Separated Value) reader for Go.
• normalizestars32 - Sanitize, normalize and compare fuzzy text.
• omniparserstars510 - A versatile ETL library that parses text input (CSV/txt/JSON/XML/EDI/X12/EDIFACT/etc) in streaming fashion and transforms data into JSON output using data-driven schema.
• parseargs-gostars10 - string argument parser that understands quotes and backslashes.
• parthstars42 - URL path segmentation parsing.
• sdpstars114 - SDP: Session Description Protocol [RFC 4566].
• shstars5.1k - Shell parser and formatter.
• whenstars1.2k - Natural EN and RU language date/time parser with pluggable rules.
• xj2gostars28 - Convert xml or json to go struct.
• genexstars67 - Count and expand Regular Expressions into all matching Strings.
• go-wildcardstars17 - Simple and lightweight wildcard pattern matching.
• goregenstars78 - Library for generating random strings from regular expressions.
• regroupstars123 - Match regex expression named groups into go struct using struct tags and automatic parsing.
• bluemondaystars2.5k - HTML Sanitizer.
• gofuckyourselfstars52 - A sanitization-based swear filter for Go.
• collystars18k - Fast and Elegant Scraping Framework for Gophers.
• dataflowkitstars547 - Web scraping Framework to turn websites into structured data.
• GoQuerystars11.9k - GoQuery brings a syntax and a set of features similar to jQuery to the Go language.
• gospiderstars177 - A simple golang spider/scraping framework,build a spider in 3 lines. migrated from goribotstars209
• pagserstars70 - Pagser is a simple, extensible, configurable parse and deserialize html page to struct based on goquery and struct tags for golang crawler.
• Tagifystars24 - Produces a set of tags from given source.
• xurlsstars967 - Extract urls from text.
• podcaststars112 - iTunes Compliant and RSS 2.0 Podcast Generator in Golang
• syndfeedstars9 - A syndication feed for Atom 1.0 and RSS 2.0.
• go-runewidthstars488 - Functions to get fixed width of the character or string.
• go-zero-widthstars106 - Zero-width character detection and removal for Go.
• kacestars19 - Common case conversions covering common initialisms.
• petrovichstars41 - Petrovich is the library which inflects Russian names to given grammatical case.
• radixstars180 - Fast string sorting algorithm.
• TySugstars14 - Alternative suggestions with respect to keyboard layouts.
• 🚀 Vite-Bootstars46 - Vite + Vue3 + TypeScript + Vue-Router4 + Pinia + Tailwind CSS + VueUse Template.
• IntelliJ Slim - Provides boilerplate codes for easier new project creation using skeleton.
• gerrystars0 - Based on bureau, includes decorations for git status, current time, username, hostname and current directory.
• temerafstars1 - Minimalist theme with decorations for git status, timestamps and last exit status.
• Tolgee - Open-source, developer & translator friendly platform enabling users to translate directly in the app they develop.
• MONAIstars3.4k - AI Toolkit for Healthcare Imaging
• Ripple - NHS-funded, community led initiative working towards an integrated Digital Care Record Platform.
• Dicooglestars327 - Dicoogle is an extensible, platform-independent and open-source PACS
• O'Donnell. Undergrad Complexity Theory. Fall 2019 (15-455) (Homework) - Undergraduate course on computational complexity theory; It follows the same spirit of Sipser's part III.
• Lipton & Regan - A list of theory blogs for computer science.
• Hashicorp Terraform Blog
• terraform-compliancestars1.2k - BDD Testing for Terraform Files.
• Deploying Discourse with Terraform - Shows how Terraform can create a running instance of Discourse on DigitalOcean in one command.
• Terraform for a Highly Available VPN between AWS and Azure - Terraform code to deploy a highly available VPN between AWS and Azure.
• Learning HashiCorp Terraform - Guide for Azure.

• Machine Learning for Software Engineers, by Nam Vustars26.2k. In their words, it's a "top-down and results-first approach designed for software engineers." Definitely bookmark and use it. It can answer many questions and connect you with great resources.
• ujjwalkarn/Machine-Learning-Tutorials
• josephmisiti/awesome-machine-learning

• Machine Learning for Software Engineers, by Nam Vustars26.1k. In their words, it's a "top-down and results-first approach designed for software engineers." Definitely bookmark and use it. It can answer many questions and connect you with great resources.
• ujjwalkarn/Machine-Learning-Tutorials
• josephmisiti/awesome-machine-learning
• Shared computational principles for language processing in humans and deep language models - Nature Neuroscience, 2022. [All Versions].
• Rquotestars2 - Rquote is a web application built using Rust and WebAssembly. It fetches Anime quotes from the Animechan API. Live Demo.
